Table 3: Average QA performance, but seems too low
Table 4 "all" column
DREAM† variant uses MLLM-extracted text context; base DREAM (no text context): MP-DocVQA 82.48, DUDE 48.32, MMLongBench-Doc ACC 25.5 / F1 26.2; LongDocURL and SlideVQA not tested
Only MMLongBench-Doc reported; LongDocURL used as 300-sample validation set during RL, not main eval; MP-DocVQA, DUDE, SlideVQA not tested
SlideVQA reported as MP-SlideVQA EM=31.98 (with PNLS=0.59 instead of F1); MP-DocVQA and DUDE values rescaled from paper's 0-1 ANLS to 0-100; LongDocURL not tested

Avg accuracy reported on MMLongBench-Doc (52.77) and LongDocURL (Loc 53.63 / Und 65.67 / Reas 52.99 / Avg 59.96); no F1 reported in main table; MP-DocVQA, DUDE, SlideVQA not tested; also tested on PaperTab and FetaTab (non-standard)
Reranker only; evaluated on MMDocIR (not in our standard 5 benchmarks); Recall@1 Macro 0.6951 / Micro 0.6759, Recall@5 Macro 0.8842 / Micro 0.8755; not directly comparable to QA accuracy benchmarks

VisDoMBench introduces a multi-document SlideVQA split with Word Overlap F1 metric (not standard SlideVQA EM/F1); SlideVQA value here is from VisDoMBench multi-doc setup, not standard SlideVQA; other 4 benchmarks not tested in standard form (paper also tests PaperTab, FetaTab, SciGraphQA, SPIQA via VisDoMBench)

Different evaluation methodology (binary 0/1 model-based judgment, not standard ANLS/EM/Acc/F1); SlideVQA reported as Single-hop=69.3 / Multi-hop=43.1 splits; MMLongBench-Doc reported by evidence type (Text=26.1, Table=26.3, Chart=24.8, Figure=25.9, Layout=21.2); also tested on ViDoSeek (Extraction=60.6, Logic=74.8); overall score 57.1 averaged across SlideVQA + ViDoSeek + MMLongBench

SlideVQA reported as EM (paper's specified metric for SlideVQA); SlideVQA F1 not reported. Smaller URaG-3B variant: MP-DocVQA 86.0, DUDE 54.1, LongDocURL 41.5, MMLongBench-Doc Acc 31.1 / F1 28.7, SlideVQA EM 63.8

SlideVQA reported as F1 (paper's choice); MMLongBench-Doc F1 not separately reported in main table. DocSeeker-SFT (SFT-only variant): MP-DocVQA 82.1, DUDE 56.8, LongDocURL 49.1, MMLongBench-Doc Acc 38.6, SlideVQA F1 75.2

DMAP only tested on MMDocQA-style benchmarks; LongDocURL Acc 60.7 and MMLongBench-Doc Acc 43.2 (paper notation 0.607/0.432); also tested on PaperTab 0.390, PaperText 0.567, FetaTab 0.725 (not in our standard 5); evaluation uses GPT-4o binary judgment via MMDocQA protocol (not standard ANLS/EM/F1)

MMLongBench-Doc from Ma et al. 2024 Table 3 (Proprietary LVLM section, gpt-4o-2024-05-13, max 120 pages); LongDocURL overall accuracy from Deng et al. 2025 Table 3 (LVLM section, 0.645 in paper notation); MP-DocVQA / DUDE / SlideVQA not evaluated in these papers
MMLongBench-Doc from Ma et al. 2024 Table 3 (Proprietary LVLM section, 128k window, max 120 pages); abstract reports F1=30.5 vs Table 3 F1=31.2; LongDocURL paper did not evaluate GPT-4V
MMLongBench-Doc from Ma et al. 2024 Table 3 (Proprietary LVLM section, claude-3-opus-20240229, 200k window, 20 concatenated images); LongDocURL paper did not evaluate Claude-3-Opus

MMLongBench-Doc from Ma et al. 2024 Table 3 (Proprietary LVLM section, gemini-1.5-pro-latest, 128k window, max 120 pages); LongDocURL overall accuracy 0.509 from Deng et al. 2025 Table 3 (LVLM section)

LongDocURL overall accuracy 0.306 from Deng et al. 2025 Table 3 (Open-source LVLM section); best open-source LVLM on LongDocURL; not evaluated on MMLongBench-Doc by Ma et al. 2024 (predates Qwen2-VL release)
MMLongBench-Doc from Ma et al. 2024 Table 3 (Open-source LVLM section, 26B params, 4k window); LongDocURL paper did not evaluate this InternVL version
LongDocURL overall accuracy 0.250 from Deng et al. 2025 Table 3 (Open-source LVLM section, Chat variant with DPO); base LLaVA-OneVision-7B = 22.0; not evaluated on MMLongBench-Doc by Ma et al. 2024
MMLongBench-Doc from Ma et al. 2024 Table 3 (Open-source LVLM section, 8B params, 2k window concatenated_images=2); LongDocURL paper did not evaluate MiniCPM
